statusLine.command:
input=$(cat)
cwd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd')
dir="${cwd/#$HOME/~}"
user=$(whoami)
if [ "$user" = "root" ]; then ucode=124; else ucode=166; fi
printf '\033[38;5;%sm%s\033[0m' "$ucode" "$user"
if [ -n "$SSH_TTY" ]; then
host=$(hostname -s)
printf ' \033[38;5;15mat \033[38;5;124m%s\033[0m' "$host"
fi
printf ' \033[38;5;64m%s\033[0m' "$dir"
if git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then
branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks symbolic-ref --quiet --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
if [ -z "$branch" ]; then
branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi
s=""
git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --quiet --ignore-submodules --cached 2>/dev/null
if [ "$?" -ne 0 ]; then s="${s}+"; fi
git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff-files --quiet --ignore-submodules -- 2>/dev/null
if [ "$?" -ne 0 ]; then s="${s}!"; fi
untracked=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks ls-files --others --exclude-standard)
if [ -n "$untracked" ]; then s="${s}?"; fi
git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --verify refs/stash >/dev/null 2>&1
if [ "$?" -eq 0 ]; then s="${s}\$"; fi
if [ -n "$s" ]; then s=" [$s]"; fi
printf ' \033[38;5;15mon \033[38;5;61m%s\033[38;5;33m%s\033[0m' "$branch" "$s"
fi
printf '\n'
